label: Creep joiner benefit
description: Defines a benefit offered by a creep joiner pawn when they join the colony. Inherits selection-weight and compatibility fields from CreepJoinerBaseDef.

letterExtra.label: Letter extra
letterExtra.description: Additional formatted text shown in the creep joiner arrival letter. Supports pawn grammar arguments such as {PAWN_nameDef}, {PAWN_pronoun}, {PAWN_possessive}, {PAWN_objective}. Marked [MustTranslate] in source.

traits.label: Traits
traits.description: Traits forced onto the pawn when this benefit is active. Loaded via BackstoryTrait.LoadDataFromXmlCustom: element name is the TraitDef defName; text is the integer degree (omitted text resolves to degree 0).

skills.label: Skills
skills.description: Skill ranges applied to the pawn. Loaded via SkillValue.LoadDataFromXmlCustom: element name is the SkillDef defName; text is an IntRange (omitted text resolves to IntRange.Zero = 0~0).

hediffs.label: Hediffs
hediffs.description: HediffDefs applied to the pawn when this benefit is active.

abilities.label: Abilities
abilities.description: AbilityDefs granted to the pawn when this benefit is active.
